title: To His Paternal Country
content:
O earth! earth! earth! hear thou my voice, and be
Loving and gentle for to cover me!
Banish'd from thee I live; ne'er to return,
Unless thou giv'st my small remains an urn.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To His Paternal Country"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
